name: H95s Hydraulic Hammer
fitment_notes: Cat H95s hammer assembly. Operating range 700–1260 bpm, ~124 dB.

name: Tool — Moil Point
fitment_notes: Moil-point tool bit for H95s. Replace when mushroomed >2 mm or cracked.

name: Tool — Chisel
fitment_notes: Chisel tool bit for H95s. Replace when edge worn >5 mm or chipped.

name: Tool — Blunt
fitment_notes: Blunt tool bit for H95s. Inspect for mushrooming and cracks every 50 hrs.

name: Upper Bushing
fitment_notes: Upper tool bushing for H95s. Replace when clearance exceeds 2 mm or scoring visible.

name: Lower Bushing
fitment_notes: Lower tool bushing for H95s. Replace when clearance exceeds 2 mm or scoring visible.

name: Retaining Pin
fitment_notes: Tool retaining pin for H95s. Check for bending, galling, or mushrooming. Replace if worn >1 mm.

name: Retaining Pin (Backup)
fitment_notes: Secondary retaining pin for H95s. Inspect at same interval as primary pin.

name: Hydraulic Hose — Pressure
fitment_notes: High-pressure jumper line for H95s. Check for abrasion, bulging, weeping at fittings.

name: Hydraulic Hose — Return
fitment_notes: Return-line jumper hose for H95s. Replace at any sign of leak or fitting damage.

name: Grease Cartridge — Auto-Lube
fitment_notes: Auto-lube grease cartridge for H95s. Verify cartridge is not empty; grease must reach tool bushing.

name: Seal Kit
fitment_notes: Complete seal kit for H95s. Replace seals at 2000-hr overhaul or if external leaks present.

name: Through-Bolt Kit
fitment_notes: Through-bolt torque kit for H95s. Re-torque every 100 hours per maintenance schedule.
